name: Team Bernie
subject: The Republican Party
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporters -
If you're watching tonight's Republican presidential debate, then you've heard a lot of talk about "carpet bombing" cities, sending our men and women into another endless war, and completely closing our borders to women and children who have lost everything but the shirts on their backs.
In short, it was a debate designed to scare you into voting for candidates who want you to forget what this election should be about.
It's about keeping our families safe, it's about fixing an immigration system to unite families, restoring our broken economy, and taking back our democracy from the billionaire class.
We bet everything you've heard from Republicans tonight makes you feel like supporting a Democrat right now.
Poll after poll shows that Bernie does better against Republican candidates than any other Democrat in this race. And right now, we are on track to reach 2 million individual contributions to our campaign by tomorrow's midnight deadline -- an absolutely unprecedented achievement that we can only reach with your help.
**[Make a $3 contribution now to help us meet our goal -- and to show the country you want our campaign to take on Donald Trump, or whomever the Republicans nominate.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29a0/43f17890/4d1dc17b/6211f95e/2227294062/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-get-2-million?refcode=em151215-GOP-debate")**
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE

Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29a0/43f17890/4d1dc17b/6211f95c/2227294062/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29a0/43f17890/4d1dc17b/6211f95d/2227294062/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29a0/43f17890/4d1dc17b/6211f95a/2227294062/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Rick Santorum
subject: 10 million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Santorum for President 2016 This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| Friend,
CNN estimated that 10 million Americans would watch our debate tonight. 10 million! But we need to make sure our message of a strong national security, border security, and a plan to defeat ISIS once and for all reaches every voter. I have been clear from the start: ISIS cannot be contained. They must be defeated. We have called out radical Islam for a decade. We imposed tough sanctions on Iran and Syria. And we are the only campaign singled out by ISIS as their enemy. I know who ISIS is, and ISIS knows who I am. And I know how to defeat them.[](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_vegasfin&n=1) [But I need your help.](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_vegasfin&n=2) We are on a path to World War III if we do not defeat ISIS now. It will take U.S. ground troops. It will take a real bombing campaign. And it will take supporting our allies who want to join the fight with us. I outlined this plan in February, and I outlined it again tonight.

[Join me in this fight. Join the fight to destroy ISIS. And together we will have a safer, stronger America for our children.](http://www.ricksantorum.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fcauses.anedot.com%2Fricksantorum&e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_vegasfin&n=3) God bless, Rick Santorum [http://www.ricksantorum.com/](http://www.ricksantorum.com/?e=84b355b85f9e9360b9dac4e2a50bbee5&utm_source=santorum&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debate_vegasfin&n=4)

body:

---
| | | | Did you watch the debate last night? I laid out why we need the strength to defeat radical Islamic terror before it comes to hit us here at home, and can't accommodate dictators and terror groups that hate us. And Peter, I meant it. Our nation is in dire need of a leader who will undo the damage done by President Obama's weakness and inaction. I'm ready to lead our country into a New American Century as your President, but I need your strong support now - [_**please become a member of Team Marco at whatever level is right for you today.**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45395815:JKXJAOLgN:m:1:1349778030:6767B0F72670429DBBD1BB18DB3EC63C:r) The Democrats know I am the best candidate to defeat Hillary Clinton next fall, and they are working around the clock to ensure my campaign is defeated. [**Peter, will you help me fight back right now? Your donation will ensure our campaign has the funds needed to run a winning campaign.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45395815:JKXJAOLgN:m:1:1349778030:6767B0F72670429DBBD1BB18DB3EC63C:r) Last night was just the beginning. We have a lot of work cut out for us before voters hit the polls in February. It is going to cost a lot of money to reach voters in every state, and the only way I'll be successful is if I have your urgent support right now. [**Please follow this link to make an urgent contribution of $25, $35, $50 or more right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45395815:JKXJAOLgN:m:1:1349778030:6767B0F72670429DBBD1BB18DB3EC63C:r) I know I've asked for your support before, but it has truly never been as critical and crucial as it is right now. I hope I can continue to count on you. Marco P.S. I am not running for president to climb a political ladder. I am running for president because I truly believe we can change our nation and leave it in better shape for our children and grandchildren. I will do just that, but I need your help to get there. [**I hope you will show you stand with me and my conservative beliefs and traditional values by making an instant online contribution right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45395815:JKXJAOLgN:m:1:1349778030:6767B0F72670429DBBD1BB18DB3EC63C:r)

name: Rand Paul
subject: Headlines from just minutes after...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
"Rand Paul Blast Trump, Rubio in Opening
Statement" -- Newsmax
"Paul: Christie 'World War III' Candidate" --
The Hill
"Paul: Rubio has 'allegiance' to liberals on
immigration" -- Washington Examiner
Rand Paul nicks Marco Rubio on immigration --
Politico
Rand Paul calls Marco Rubio the 'weakest'
candidate on immigration" -- The Week
Those were the news headlines from just
minutes after last night's debate in Las Vegas, Nevada.
Patriot, will you chip in $10 or $20 to
support my campaign's Money Bomb and help take our momentum as
far as possible?
I believe the American people saw a crystal
clear difference between my vision for America and my Republican
opponents last night on national security.
With less than seven weeks until voters start
selecting our party's nominee, it couldn't have come at a better
time.
You see, I believe securing America starts
with securing our borders. It starts with fixing our broken visa
system. It starts with vetting those who are coming into our
country to ensure they don't pose a danger.
It starts with ensuring our national debt
doesn't swamp our ability to fund national defense.
It starts with ending the endless taxpayer
handouts to countries that burn our flag and refuse to recognize
Israel or renounce terrorism.
My opponents want to throw the borders wide
open. They want to spend like there's no tomorrow.
They want to keep toppling secular Middle
Eastern strongmen, which we've seen only emboldens radical
Islamists.
They want us to keep allowing potentially
dangerous refugees into our country, and force you and me to pick
up the tab for more taxpayer handouts.
Then, they tell us they need to spy on all of
us, while they allow people into the country who've called for
Jihad on the Internet!
We need a new direction -- not the same old
failed policies that we've seen from BOTH parties.
Patriot, right now is when the rubber meets
the road. It's when this campaign is set to reach a fever pitch.
Thanks to your support, we've been building
the grassroots organization to win.
But this is crunch time.
Please agree to our most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 to support my campaign's
Money Bomb right away!
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

$25 Money Bomb >>

$50 Money Bomb >>

$100 Money Bomb >>

Or donate another
amount >>

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: Wash. Post: "Put Lindsey Graham in the main debate against Donald Trump already!"
body:
Friend, Senator Graham won the debate. | |

---
---
|
Friend,

**There's no denying it -- Senator Graham had another huge win at last night's debate.**

But don't take my word for it. Did you see the headline from _The Washington Post_? Just look:

**"Put Lindsey Graham in the main debate against Donald Trump already!"**
\-- _The Washington Post_ , December 15, 2015
But the _Post_ didn't stop there. The author said: "Simply put, Graham was in a different league." And more: "In a debate focused on foreign policy, Graham came off as the only one who had confidence in what he was saying. The other candidates used him as sounding board as much as they offered their own ideas; the moderators used him as a temperature check."

Friend, we don't say this a lot about _The Washington Post_ , but **we couldn't agree more**.

[**If you agree that Senator Graham won the early debate and that his voice deserves to be heard - especially on the main debate stage - will you show your support for his campaign by making an instant online contribution?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32306669:WfHEKhyMN:m:1:877327319:CC7585FEA8ADABD975310C7C13B1B98B:r)

The debate showed that protecting Americans from terrorist attacks and defeating ISIL must be the most important priorities of this country. **Let me be abundantly clear: these are also Senator Graham's top priorites now and on Day One as Commander-in-Chief.**

What set Senator Graham apart from the other candidates during the debate is his clear plan for defeating ISIL: **do whatever it takes, as long as it takes, to defeat the enemy and protect the United States.**

It may be a clear message, but it isn't always easy to make sure Senator Graham's voice is heard by every American. Running a presidential campaign is extremely expensive, and that's why I'm asking you to help by [**chipping in whatever you can afford today**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32306669:WfHEKhyMN:m:1:877327319:CC7585FEA8ADABD975310C7C13B1B98B:r).

Your donation will help ensure Senator Graham can continue to talk to voters about what matters most to them: protecting our nation.

It's time for our campaign to capitalize on the momentum of last night's debate and head into 2016 with a strong start. [**Follow this link to make an instant online donation to support our campaign.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32306669:WfHEKhyMN:m:1:877327319:CC7585FEA8ADABD975310C7C13B1B98B:r)

Thanks,

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager
Lindsey Graham 2016

P.S. _The Washington Post_ said that Senator Graham "dominated everyone who was in the room with him" at last night's debate with a strong performance focused on keeping our nation safe. Please help us capitalize on this momentum and keep it going. [**Will you make an instant online donation to tell Senator Graham you support him right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32306669:WfHEKhyMN:m:1:877327319:CC7585FEA8ADABD975310C7C13B1B98B:r)

[** Instant Donate >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32306670:WfHEKhyMN:m:1:877327319:CC7585FEA8ADABD975310C7C13B1B98B:r) |

subject: most important email I've sent, Friend
body:
Friend -- Last night was big. No two ways about it.

So, this morning when I went over the list of everyone who stepped up before and even after the debate, and I still didn't see your name, I was surprised.

I need you with me now. The next 72 hours are critical. The pundits and press will ask, "Did Jeb capitalize on his great performance? Did this motivate his team?" **We need you to step up and help us raise $100,000 by Friday at midnight so the answer will be yes.**

[**Friend , will you rush a contribution of $1 or more right now to build our momentum and update your status on our list of debate donors?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/zdsjvbfqdlskzczrkbtjdkgcffkgqcvqjbwbsqcppbdd_ksdvvfpt.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

name: Rand Paul
subject: 48 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot,
"Rand Paul Blast Trump, Rubio in Opening
Statement" -- Newsmax
"Paul: Christie 'World War III' Candidate" --
The Hill
"Paul: Rubio has 'allegiance' to liberals on
immigration" -- Washington Examiner
Rand Paul nicks Marco Rubio on immigration --
Politico
Rand Paul calls Marco Rubio the 'weakest'
candidate on immigration" -- The Week
Those were the news headlines from just
minutes after last night's debate in Las Vegas, Nevada.
Patriot, will you chip in $10 or $20 to
support my campaign's Money Bomb and help take our momentum as
far as possible?
I believe the American people saw a crystal
clear difference between my vision for America and my Republican
opponents last night on national security.
With less than seven weeks until voters start
selecting our party's nominee, it couldn't have come at a better
time.
You see, I believe securing America starts
with securing our borders. It starts with fixing our broken visa
system. It starts with vetting those who are coming into our
country to ensure they don't pose a danger.
It starts with ensuring our national debt
doesn't swamp our ability to fund national defense.
It starts with ending the endless taxpayer
handouts to countries that burn our flag and refuse to recognize
Israel or renounce terrorism.
My opponents want to throw the borders wide
open. They want to spend like there's no tomorrow.
They want to keep toppling secular Middle
Eastern strongmen, which we've seen only emboldens radical
Islamists.
They want us to keep allowing potentially
dangerous refugees into our country, and force you and me to pick
up the tab for more taxpayer handouts.
Then, they tell us they need to spy on all of
us, while they allow people into the country who've called for
Jihad on the Internet!
We need a new direction -- not the same old
failed policies that we've seen from BOTH parties.
Patriot, right now is when the rubber meets
the road. It's when this campaign is set to reach a fever pitch.
Thanks to your support, we've been building
the grassroots organization to win.
But this is crunch time.
Please agree to our most generous
contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 to support my campaign's
Money Bomb right away!
In Liberty,
Rand Paul

$25 Money Bomb >>

$50 Money Bomb >>

$100 Money Bomb >>

Or donate another
amount >>

Since then we've demonstrated the strength of our political revolution: we've risen in the polls, drawn the largest crowds and volunteer base of any campaign, and last quarter raised more money than every Republican and almost as much as Hillary Clinton.
But our movement isn't about _how much money_ we raise, it's about _how many times individuals_ have stepped up to contribute to our campaign. And right now, **we 're just short of reaching our historic goal of two million individual contributions by midnight tonight.**

name: Protect Women's Health
subject: ADD YOUR NAME: Denounce violence against women's health clinics
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Last month, a gunman opened fire at a Planned Parenthood clinic in Colorado Springs, killing a police officer and two civilians. Nine others were wounded, and many more men and women felt terrorized by the shocking violence inflicted upon those seeking legal medical procedures.

Women's health clinics have seen a dramatic increase in threats, harassment, and violence in recent months, but too many anti-choice Republicans refuse to take it seriously.

[**Sign your name here to tell Republicans: Denounce the violence against women 's health clinics.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4692111888090136576/-7216153087210160128?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pp)

Conservative talk show hosts, Republican Presidential candidates, and anti-choice extremists spend their days demonizing Planned Parenthood, but it's not just talk - their hate-inspired rhetoric is unquestionably helping fuel the sentiment behind the kind of violence we saw in Colorado Springs.

Friend, free speech is one thing. But hiding behind it when confronted with this kind of violence is not something we can allow.

[**Add your name here to tell Republicans that violence against women's health clinics is unacceptable.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4692111888090136576/-7216153087210160128?utm_source=mcginty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pp)

More than 2.7 million men and women visit Planned Parenthood clinics every year. If we want to protect their access to reproductive care, and the right to access that care free from fear or intimidation, we need our leaders to stand up and denounce the violence that threatens us - before more lives are lost.

| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4692111888090136576/-7144095493172232192?refcode=e20151216&refcode2=e20151216&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate

name: Madeleine Albright
subject: The Oval Office in 2017
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
A matter of national security | Friend --

When Hillary Clinton became Secretary of State in 2009, America’s place on the world stage was as unsure as ever.

Our reputation as a nation was in tatters, and we faced a huge question: What should America do and be on the world stage?

Hillary went to work. She negotiated the toughest sanctions Iran has ever faced and negotiated a ceasefire between Israel and Hamas. Hillary made women's and children's issues central to American foreign policy and took historic steps on LGBT issues.

If you've followed Hillary's career, you know she's ready to serve as our president -- and if you know what challenges we're facing across the globe, you know there's no other person we can afford to have in the Oval Office in 2017.
